titleStmt.title: Letter from Theodore Roosevelt to Henry Cabot Lodge, 26 April 1898
titleStmt.author: Theodore Roosevelt

publicationStmt.p: Encoded for the TR Digital Library, public domain.

sourceDesc.bibl: Selections from the Correspondence of Theodore Roosevelt and Henry Cabot Lodge, 1884-1918, vol. I.

div.head: To Henry Cabot Lodge
div.p: War is now declared. I am off for San Antonio to muster my regiment of Rough Riders and I write in haste.
